_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Redis
description: An in-memory key-value database, cache, and message broker. Commonly used as a task broker for Paperless-ngx or for performance caching in Nextcloud.
startup: if [ -z "${REDIS_PASSWORD}" ]; then exec redis-server --port ${SERVER_PORT} --protected-mode no --dir /home/container; else exec redis-server --port ${SERVER_PORT} --requirepass "${REDIS_PASSWORD}" --protected-mode no --dir /home/container; fi

variables.name: Redis Password
variables.description: The password required to connect to the Redis server. Leave empty to run without a password.
